data.title: Add SKILL_ENTER/SKILL_EXIT breadcrumbs to implementation-plan/SKILL.md
data.description:
## Description
Add SKILL_ENTER breadcrumb at start of skill execution (after config resolution).
Add SKILL_EXIT breadcrumb before STATUS line emission.
Capture all 10 data points per SKILL-TRACE-FORMAT.md: skill_name=implementation-plan, nesting_depth (from parent convention), skill_file_size (via wc -c on SKILL.md resolved via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT), tool_call_count (session-global, approximate), elapsed_ms, session_ordinal (best-effort), cumulative_bytes (best-effort), termination_directive (scan STATUS line only), user_interaction_count, timestamp.
All echo commands use || true. Pure Markdown edits.

## TDD Requirement
Unit test exemption — criterion 1 (no conditional logic: echo only) + criterion 3 (SKILL.md = LLM instructions). Integration test rejected: no dry-run mode for SKILL.md; analysis script synthetic test validates format end-to-end.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] SKILL_ENTER present
  Verify: grep -q 'SKILL_ENTER' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL_EXIT present
  Verify: grep -q 'SKILL_EXIT' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] skill_name logged
  Verify: grep -A10 'SKILL_ENTER' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -q 'skill_name'
- [ ] nesting_depth logged
  Verify: grep -A10 'SKILL_ENTER' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -qi 'depth'
- [ ] skill_file_size logged
  Verify: grep -A10 'SKILL_ENTER' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -qi 'file_size\|wc'
- [ ] elapsed_ms logged
  Verify: grep -A10 'SKILL_EXIT' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -qi 'elapsed'
- [ ] No unsafe echo (all have || true)
  Verify: grep 'echo.*SKILL_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md | grep -v '|| true' | wc -l | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
